title: After the Japanese Derby: The Ines Chant

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a race! Ines Fujin secures a fantastic victory
at the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just listen as the crowd goes wild! A thunderous
round of applause for this year's Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! I did it! I really did it!!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm... the Derby champion! Aha... hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text: Insane! That was totally wild, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
That was crazy! She looks totally wiped out! But
still...

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Why does she look so freakin' cool?!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! That was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I don't know what to do with myself!
These cheers... are all for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Is it really okay to have such an incredible
moment all to myself?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah, I have to go. Everyone is applauding me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I have to hurry to the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Agh... Ahaha. It's no good. I can barely stay
standing...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I have to move... I have to respond to
everyone's cheers...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aha... I, uh, don't think I can move right now. Can
you go on ahead and give my thanks to
everyone?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...C'mon, don't ask for the impossible. Someone's gotta answer those cheers, so you should hurry on over and...
choice_data_list: But you're the one everyone is waiting for.
But you're the one everyone is waiting for.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INES! INES! INEEES! INEEES!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haha... I'm not even in the winner's circle yet.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Are they going to keep chanting my name until I
arrive?
choice_data_list: That's how inspiring your performance was.
That's how inspiring your performance was.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Geez...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Can we go slowly? I think I should be able to
make it...
choice_data_list: Sure. Here, grab onto my shoulder.
Sure. Here, grab onto my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! Don't complain if I'm too heavy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I wasn't kidding when I told Trainer I couldn't
walk. I mean, I used up every last ounce of energy
I had in the race just now.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(This was my dream—charging across the Derby
finish line with the crowd's passionate cheers
behind me.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (And now, I've finally done it.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But now... When I can hear everyone cheering my
name so loud and clear...)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If everyone's cheering this loud for me, then I
gotta give them what they want—one final spurt!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But the Triple Crown tour isn't over yet. You'll
have to fend off another fierce opponent in the
next race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Still, I'll be the one who takes the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The winning concert pulses with incredible
energy, as spectators and Umamusume alike bask
in the excitement until the very last light dims.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's as if they're reluctant to part with the
crowning moment of the Derby dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if they're celebrating the futures of all
Umamusume who have crossed this significant
milestone in their racing careers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk over to Ines Fujin, who sang splendidly as
the lead star of the concert.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer. Do you think I managed to sing well
up to the very end?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I hope I was able to express my gratitude to
everyone for chanting my name the way they did.
choice_data_list: Definitely! It was a great concert!
Definitely! It was a great concert!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to... hear that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Really... glad...

Ines Fujin collapses onto the cold, hard floor of
the backstage wings.
